summary: STEP 7 EmptyState component testing completed. All 4 empty states verified: (1) Leads empty state in Dashboard.tsx with UserPlus icon, headline 'Your first lead is one click away.', CTA '+ Add Lead', (2) Quotes empty state in QuotesTab.tsx with FileText icon, headline 'Send your first quote in 2 minutes.', CTA '+ Create Quote', (3) Contracts empty state in ContractsTab.tsx with Signature icon, headline 'Get your first contract signed today.', CTA '+ New Contract', (4) Calendar empty state in CalendarViewNew.tsx with CalendarBlank icon, headline 'See your whole schedule at a glance.', CTA 'Connect Google Calendar'. Calendar empty state was visually confirmed in UI testing. All EmptyState instances use data-testid='empty-state' and data-testid='empty-state-cta' attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: EmptyState component at /frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx correctly implements: Phosphor Icon type prop, weight='duotone', bg-brand-100 icon container, bg-brand-600 CTA button with hover:bg-brand-700, full-width max-w-xs styling
Dashboard.tsx lines 57-58 import EmptyState and UserPlus, lines 956-963 render leads empty state with correct props
QuotesTab.tsx lines 31-32 import EmptyState, lines 239-246 render quotes empty state with FileText icon and correct headline/CTA
ContractsTab.tsx lines 34-35 import EmptyState and Signature, lines 338-345 render contracts empty state with correct props
CalendarViewNew.tsx lines 20-21 import CalendarBlank, line 35 imports EmptyState, lines 323-337 render calendar empty state with Google Calendar CTA
All EmptyState instances have data-testid='empty-state' and data-testid='empty-state-cta' for automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: EmptyState component is reusable across 4 views. Test account has existing leads so Leads empty state won't be visible. Quotes/Contracts empty states appear inside LeadDetailModal tabs - need to find a lead without quotes/contracts to see them. Calendar empty state is visible when no bookings exist. Onboarding wizard and tour popups may need dismissal before testing.

Login_Flow.details: Login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 redirects to /dashboard

Dashboard_Loading.details: Dashboard loads with Active Commissions, kanban board, stats cards visible

EmptyState_Component_Code_Review.details: Component exists at correct path with proper props interface, data-testid attributes, and styling

Leads_EmptyState_Code_Review.details: Dashboard.tsx uses EmptyState with UserPlus icon, headline 'Your first lead is one click away.', CTA '+ Add Lead', onCta opens AddLeadModal

Quotes_EmptyState_Code_Review.details: QuotesTab.tsx uses EmptyState with FileText icon, headline 'Send your first quote in 2 minutes.', CTA '+ Create Quote', onCta opens QuoteBuilder

Contracts_EmptyState_Code_Review.details: ContractsTab.tsx uses EmptyState with Signature icon, headline 'Get your first contract signed today.', CTA '+ New Contract', onCta opens template selector

Calendar_EmptyState_UI_Test.details: Calendar view shows EmptyState with CalendarBlank icon, headline 'See your whole schedule at a glance.', CTA 'Connect Google Calendar' - visually confirmed

data_testid_Attributes.details: EmptyState component has data-testid='empty-state' on container and data-testid='empty-state-cta' on CTA button

No_Console_Errors.details: No significant console errors (only expected 401s for unauthenticated resources)
